ValidationRule.description: Due Date must be in the future
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($User.BypassValidationRules__c), ISNEW(), RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Client_delivery_request', Due_date__c < TODAY() +21 )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You cannot enter a Due Date that is less than 21 days for Data Solution and Solvency Request
